
Catch Fits {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Landings

```{r catch_landings}
# Stocks as columns; one row per commercial fleet.
catch    <- mv$catch_fits
catch_fl <- catch[catch$fleet %in% comm_fleets, , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(catch_fl) > 0) {
  has_catch_stock <- "stock" %in% names(catch_fl) && length(unique(catch_fl$stock)) > 1L
  catch_stocks    <- if (has_catch_stock) unique(catch_fl$stock) else NULL
  fc              <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = comm_fleets)

  if (has_catch_stock) {
    all_panels <- list()
    for (fl in comm_fleets) {
      sub <- catch_fl[catch_fl$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
      for (stk in catch_stocks) {
        stk_sub  <- sub[sub$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE]
        panel_lbl <- if (length(comm_fleets) > 1L) paste(fl, stk, sep = " - ") else stk
        p <- plot_ly()
        pred_sub <- stk_sub[!is.na(stk_sub$pred), , drop = FALSE]
        if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0)
          p <- add_lines(p = p, x = pred_sub$year, y = pred_sub$pred,
            line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2), showlegend = FALSE,
            hovertemplate = paste0("Pred %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
        obs_sub <- stk_sub[!is.na(stk_sub$obs) & stk_sub$obs > 0, , drop = FALSE]
        if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0)
          p <- add_markers(p = p, x = obs_sub$year, y = obs_sub$obs,
            marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 5, symbol = "circle-open",
                          line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 1.5)),
            showlegend = FALSE,
            hovertemplate = paste0("Obs %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
        lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
        lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = panel_lbl))
        lay$yaxis$title <- "Landings"
        p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
        all_panels[[length(all_panels) + 1L]] <- p
      }
    }
    p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(all_panels, list(
      nrows = length(comm_fleets), shareX = TRUE, shareY = FALSE,
      titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04
    )))
    p_out <- layout(p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year"))
    modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)

  } else {
    plot_list <- list()
    for (fl in comm_fleets) {
      sub      <- catch_fl[catch_fl$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
      p        <- plot_ly()
      pred_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$pred), , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0)
        p <- add_lines(p = p, x = pred_sub$year, y = pred_sub$pred,
          line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2), showlegend = FALSE,
          hovertemplate = paste0("Pred %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
      obs_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$obs) & sub$obs > 0, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0)
        p <- add_markers(p = p, x = obs_sub$year, y = obs_sub$obs,
          marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 5, symbol = "circle-open",
                        line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 1.5)),
          showlegend = FALSE,
          hovertemplate = paste0("Obs %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
      lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
      lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = fl))
      lay$yaxis$title <- "Landings"
      p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
      plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
    }
    p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(plot_list, list(
      nrows = length(plot_list), shareX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04
    )))
    p_out <- layout(p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year"))
    modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
  }
}
```

### Releases

```{r catch_releases, eval=has_disc && !is.null(mv$discard_fits)}
disc <- mv$discard_fits
disc_fl <- disc[disc$fleet %in% comm_fleets,
                , drop = FALSE]
if (nrow(disc_fl) > 0) {
  fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = comm_fleets)
  plot_list <- list()
  for (fl in comm_fleets) {
    sub <- disc_fl[disc_fl$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
    p <- plot_ly()

    pred_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$pred), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0) {
      p <- add_lines(
        p = p,
        x = pred_sub$year, y = pred_sub$pred,
        line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          fl, " Pred %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
        )
      )
    }

    obs_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$obs) & sub$obs > 0,
                   , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0) {
      p <- add_markers(
        p = p,
        x = obs_sub$year, y = obs_sub$obs,
        marker = list(
          color = fc[fl], size = 5,
          line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
        ),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(
          fl, " Obs %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"
        )
      )
    }

    lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = fl))
    lay$yaxis$title <- "Releases"
    p <- do.call(
      what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
    )
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1L]] <- p
  }

  p_out <- subplot(
    plot_list,
    nrows = length(plot_list),
    shareX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE,
    margin = 0.04
  )
  p_out <- layout(
    p = p_out, xaxis = list(title = "Year")
  )
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
}
```

### Observation Error

```{r obs_error_table, eval=!is.null(mv$obs_error)}
oe <- mv$obs_error
oe$tau <- round(x = oe$tau, digits = 4)
knitr::kable(
  x = oe,
  caption = "Estimated observation standard deviations",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
